   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Install gwexpy with pinned versions of core dependencies for reproducibility on Colab\n",
    "\n",
    "%pip install -q \"gwexpy[all]\" \"gwpy<5.0.0\" \"numpy<2.0.0\" \"scipy<1.13.0\" \"astropy<7.0.0\""
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c4949716",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# フィッティング: 基本\n",
    "\n",
    "**目的**: 通常最小二乗法（OLS）および一般化最小二乗法（GLS）を使用して GW データにモデルをフィットする方法を学びます。\n",
    "\n",
    "GWexpy は主要な最適化エンジンとして **iminuit** を使用し、相関を持つスペクトルデータ用の特化したコスト関数を提供します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3a759f53",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. 単純な OLS フィット\n",
    "\n",
    "対角誤差（OLS）を使った単純なべき乗則フィットから始めます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "7613b01e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:56.419777Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:56.419632Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.381653Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.380876Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "フィット結果: a=2.03, b=8.07\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.asd import white_noise\n",
    "from gwexpy.fitting import fit_series\n",
    "\n",
    "# 合成データの生成\n",
    "freqs = np.linspace(10, 100, 50)\n",
    "model = lambda f, a, b: a * f + b\n",
    "y_true = model(freqs, 2.0, 10.0)\n",
    "y_obs = y_true + np.random.normal(0, 2, size=len(freqs))\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.frequencyseries import FrequencySeries\n",
    "psd = FrequencySeries(y_obs, frequencies=freqs)\n",
    "\n",
    "res = fit_series(psd, model, p0={\"a\": 1.0, \"b\": 1.0})\n",
    "\n",
    "res.plot()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "print(f\"フィット結果: a={res.params['a']:.2f}, b={res.params['b']:.2f}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0fd19882",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. 一般化最小二乗法（GLS）\n",
    "\n",
    "データ点が相関している場合（例：重なり窓を使った PSD 推定）、共分散行列 $\\Sigma$ を使用します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "65876a15",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.384358Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.383844Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.389381Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.388852Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "<ValueView a=2.026978885663505 b=8.074173214168809>\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from gwexpy.fitting import GeneralizedLeastSquares\n",
    "from iminuit import Minuit\n",
    "\n",
    "# ダミー共分散行列の作成\n",
    "cov = np.eye(len(freqs)) * 4.0\n",
    "cov_inv = np.linalg.inv(cov)\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. コスト関数の定義\n",
    "cost = GeneralizedLeastSquares(freqs, y_obs, cov_inv, model, cov=cov)\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Minuit の初期化と実行\n",
    "m = Minuit(cost, a=1.0, b=1.0)\n",
    "m.migrad()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(m.values)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "da3becc0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. 高レベル統合パイプライン\n",
    "\n",
    "実際の解析では、ブートストラップ法を使ってデータ自体から共分散行列を推定することが多いです。GWexpy はこのための統合パイプラインを提供しています。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "9399cbb1",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.391177Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:59.391039Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:14:01.372983Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:14:01.372630Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from gwexpy.fitting.highlevel import fit_bootstrap_spectrum\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.wave import colored\n",
    "\n",
    "# 10秒間のピンクノイズを生成\n",
    "data = colored(duration=10, sample_rate=256, exponent=0.5, amplitude=1e-21)\n",
    "\n",
    "def power_law(f, A, alpha):\n",
    "    return A * f**alpha\n",
    "\n",
    "result = fit_bootstrap_spectrum(\n",
    "    data,\n",
    "    model_fn=power_law,\n",
    "    freq_range=(10, 100),\n",
    "    fftlength=1.0,\n",
    "    overlap=0.5,\n",
    "    initial_params={\"A\": 1e-21, \"alpha\": -0.5},\n",
    "    plot=True\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d16c2434",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. 演習\n",
    "\n",
    "1. **パラメータ制約**: `fit_series` の `limits` 引数を使って `a > 0` となるよう OLS フィットを修正してください。\n",
    "2. **MCMC**: セクション 3 で `run_mcmc=True` を設定して MCMC を有効にしてください（`emcee` が必要）。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c1a615b8",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 5. 検証セル（NBMAKE）"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",

     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:14:01.377324Z"
    }
   },

      "検証完了！\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "assert \"a\" in res.params\n",
    "assert result.reduced_chi2 > 0\n",
    "print(\"検証完了！\")"
   ]
  }
